title: Strait Configuration
description: Configuration file for Strait SDK projects. Place this file at the root of your project as strait.json. IDEs (VS Code, JetBrains) will auto-complete fields and validate values when the $schema field is present.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference. Set to https://api.strait.dev/schemas/v1/strait.json for IDE autocomplete.

project.description: Project identity. The id must match the project created in the Strait dashboard.

id.description: Project ID from the Strait dashboard (e.g. proj_abc123).

name.description: Human-readable project name. Used in CLI output and dashboard labels.

endpoint_url.description: The URL where the Strait platform sends job execution requests (webhook endpoint). This is what createServeHandler() listens on. Per-environment overrides go in the environments section.

dirs.description: Directories containing job and workflow definitions. Used by 'strait register', 'strait deploy', and 'strait dev'. Paths are relative to the strait.json location.

retries.description: Default retry policy applied to all jobs. Can be overridden per-job in the SDK.

max_attempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts after the initial failure. 0 means no retries.

initial_delay_secs.description: Delay before the first retry in seconds.

max_delay_secs.description: Maximum delay between retries in seconds. Only applies to exponential and linear strategies.

max_duration_secs.description: Default maximum execution time in seconds for all jobs. Overridable per-job. Maximum is 86400 (24 hours).

sdk.description: SDK connection settings. Auth tokens are never stored here — use environment variables.

base_url.description: Strait API base URL. Defaults to https://api.strait.dev.

auth_type.description: Authentication method used by the SDK.

timeout_ms.description: HTTP request timeout in milliseconds for SDK API calls.

debug.description: Enable verbose SDK logging. Do not enable in production.

deploy.description: Code-first deployment settings. Used by 'strait deploy' to build and push container images.

runtime.description: Programming language runtime for the generated container image. Must match the SDK you are using.

build_command.description: Shell command to run before bundling (e.g. 'bun run build', 'go build'). Run in the project root.

output_dir.description: Directory containing compiled output to bundle. Relative to the project root.

worker.description: Worker process settings for self-hosted execution.

concurrency.description: Number of job runs the worker executes concurrently.

poll_interval_ms.description: How often the worker polls for new runs in milliseconds.

signing_secret_env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the webhook signing secret. The secret itself is never stored in this file.

environments.description: Per-environment configuration overrides. Select an environment with 'strait --env <name>' or via the CLI default_environment setting.

default_environment.description: Environment name to use when --env is not specified.

output_format.description: Default output format for CLI commands.

environment.description: Environment-specific overrides. Any field here replaces the top-level value for that environment.

base_url.description: Strait API base URL for this environment.

endpoint_url.description: Webhook endpoint URL for this environment.

api_key_env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the API key for this environment (e.g. STRAIT_STAGING_API_KEY).
